remaining_annotations.text: Node.js 20 is deprecated. Actions target node20 but are being forced to run on node24.
remaining_annotations.permanent_fix: Action maintainers update action.yml runs.using to node24. GitHub cutover June 2 2026.

browser_mobile_smoke.new_gating_tests_note: 3 gating tests × 5 viewports = 15. Pass on tablet-768x1024 (market table visible). Skip on 4 mobile viewports (mobile market layout has no table rows — intentional skip, not failure).

vercel_preview_build_fix.root_cause_fixed_step1: auth.ts:32 called readJwtSecret() at module initialization time. next build 'Collecting page data' phase threw JWT_SECRET environment variable is required. Fixed dc73940: lazy getSecret() — JWT_SECRET only read at request time.
vercel_preview_build_fix.root_cause_fixed_step2: rootDirectory:null in Vercel project metadata. Fixed e8be547: vercel.json at repo root pinning buildCommand=pnpm --filter neura-web build, outputDirectory=apps/web/.next, framework=nextjs — no longer requires operator dashboard config.
vercel_preview_build_fix.local_build_without_jwt_secret: PASS — 37 static pages generated, all routes collected

closure_smoke.next_build: PASS (37 static pages, no JWT_SECRET at build)
closure_smoke.api_smoke: PASS 6/6 (version returns real 80e1e5a SHA + branch + buildTime)
closure_smoke.playwright: PASS 85 / SKIP 0 / FAIL 0 (85 total, 5 viewports — was 60/12-skip; mobile selector fix + 25 new hardened tests across 3 rounds: f96ff53/4c876af/80e1e5a)
closure_smoke.analysis_api_contract: PASS — /api/v1/assets/BTCUSDT/analysis with no live provider returns dataQuality.analysisAllowed=false, all canShow.* flags=false, fundamentalSummary='Temel analiz için güvenilir veri yok.', tradePlan.target=null

version_endpoint_observed.note: deploymentId/deploymentUrl filled by Vercel's auto-injected VERCEL_URL on real deploy — traceabilityComplete:true is achievable in production without any operator env-var setup.

remaining_gates_for_production_ready: Operator triggers Vercel preview deploy at 80e1e5a+ → confirm preview URL works (vercel.json fix should unblock)
Real device smoke (iOS Safari + iOS or Android Chrome) at preview URL → REAL_MOBILE_PASS
Production deploy at 80e1e5a+ → confirm aycmarket.com/api/v1/version returns traceabilityComplete:true → PROD_PASS

vercel_preview_history.known_cause: auth.ts module-level readJwtSecret() — fixed in dc73940
unknown — different error from #1, inspector 403 from sandbox
unknown — inspector 403 from sandbox. rootDirectory:null conflicts with VERCEL_ENV_SETUP.txt documented apps/web. Operator must set Root Directory and Build Command in Vercel dashboard.

real_mobile.reason: Sandbox cannot access real mobile device. Vercel preview has 3 consecutive FAILED deploys (no preview URL). Production network blocked (403). LAN requires physical Windows PC.

options_attempted.detail: 3 consecutive FAILED deploys. Latest (207962d, 23:46 UTC): nextCommitStatus: FAILED, previewUrl empty. Inspector: https://vercel.com/celebimehmethanifi-creators-projects/web/AQ3CkXTWMJGGuRcFVTTQorMYv8c3. Operator must fix Vercel project config.
Requires physical Windows PC C:\Users\mhani\Desktop\NEURA and real mobile on same Wi-Fi. Sandbox cannot do this.

required_to_pass: At minimum: real iOS Safari screenshots
Preferred: iOS Safari + iOS Chrome or Android Chrome
Pages: Dashboard, Market, Asset detail modal, Alarms, Performance, Social
All visual checks pass (no overlap, no overflow, no fake live claims)

production.vercel_preview_deploy: 3 consecutive FAILED deploys. Latest inspector: https://vercel.com/celebimehmethanifi-creators-projects/web/AQ3CkXTWMJGGuRcFVTTQorMYv8c3 (commit 207962d, 23:46 UTC). auth.ts JWT_SECRET build crash fixed in dc73940. Remaining failure: unknown, requires Vercel dashboard access.
production.live_version_observed: 403 Forbidden from sandbox — cannot confirm. Prior manual evidence: not_provided_by_cli_deploy.
production.root_cause_version: Vercel CLI deploy does not inject VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA/REF. All version-info.ts fields fall to CLI_FALLBACK sentinel.
production.fix_option_a: Enable Vercel Git integration → auto-injects VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_SHA, VERCEL_GIT_COMMIT_REF, VERCEL_DEPLOYMENT_ID, VERCEL_URL
production.fix_option_b: Set NEXT_PUBLIC_COMMIT_SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD), NEXT_PUBLIC_BRANCH, BUILD_TIME, DEPLOYMENT_URL in Vercel dashboard env vars before CLI deploy
production.required_to_pass: aycmarket.com/api/v1/version must return traceabilityComplete:true with real commitSha/branch
production.sandbox_constraint: Cannot access Vercel dashboard or run production deploy. Cannot access production endpoints (403).

open_issues.issue: All original source-level truth leaks
CI: gitleaks-config unexpected input
CI: node-version 20→22
Browser/mobile emulation — 48 pass / 12 intentional skip / 0 fail. 3 new data-gating tests added.
mapLegacyStatus('fallback') → 'delayed' allowed trading metrics for fallback analysis. Fixed: → 'insufficient'. file: lib/markets/data-status.ts
hasSufficientData only excluded insufficient+no_data. demo and ayc_data could show LONG/SHORT and target/stop/RR. Fixed: whitelist live+delayed only. file: AssetDetailModal.tsx
DirectionChip (LONG/SHORT) rendered unconditionally regardless of data quality. Fixed: gated by hasSufficientData. file: AssetDetailModal.tsx
TextBoxes showed 'değerlendirme yapıldı' and technicalSummary when data was unsafe. Fixed: gate text content by hasSufficientData. file: AssetDetailModal.tsx
Technical indicators (RSI/MACD/ATR/Support/Resistance) showed for insufficient data. Fixed: gated by hasSufficientData. file: AssetDetailModal.tsx
dashboard/page.tsx hardcoded {a.isLive ? 'Canlı' : 'Demo'} — not through central getStatusLabel. Fixed: now uses getStatusLabel('live') / getStatusLabel('demo'). file: dashboard/page.tsx line 1639
vercel.json at repo root pinning buildCommand=pnpm --filter neura-web build, outputDirectory=apps/web/.next, framework=nextjs. Replaces rootDirectory:null dashboard requirement.

next.config.js: build-time git embedding (execSync git rev-parse HEAD/abbrev-ref HEAD + ISO buildTime) → NEXT_PUBLIC_COMMIT_SHA/_BRANCH/_BUILD_TIME consumed by version-info.ts. CLI deploy no longer needs operator env-var setup for traceability.

Backend analysis route was producing 'için momentum ve hacim odaklı değerlendirme yapıldı' UNCONDITIONALLY in fundamentalSummary even when dataStatus=no_data/insufficient/fallback. Fixed: buildFundamentalSummary requires analysisAllowed=true; otherwise returns safe message. tradePlan numeric fields forced to null when blocked. file: app/api/v1/assets/[symbol]/analysis/route.ts

Central market-truth.ts: buildMarketTruth() with explicit canShow{TradePlan,Target,Stop,RiskReward,Kelly,Probability,DirectionChip,Technical,Fundamental} boolean flags. Single fail-closed gate consumed by UI + API. file: lib/markets/market-truth.ts

Analysis API now exposes dataQuality.analysisAllowed + dataQuality.canShow.* flags. AssetDetailModal consumes these directly; when canShowTradePlan=false the entire MetricCard grid is hidden and a single 'Yeterli güvenilir veri olmadığı için analiz üretilemedi.' message renders (data-testid=analysis-blocked-message). Demo İşlem button gated by analysisAllowed. files: app/api/v1/assets/[symbol]/analysis/route.ts, components/ui/AssetDetailModal.tsx
BrainMap.tsx: 'Canlı Beyin Haritası' → 'Beyin Haritası'. Static viz had no real live data claim to justify the label.

Mobile shell central CSS: globals.css adds --app-safe-top/-bottom/-left/-right + --app-bottom-nav-height + --app-content-bottom-pad. .app-main uses these so every page gets uniform bottom padding (no per-page hacks). New .app-sticky-bottom utility positions copilot/composer above bottom nav. New .app-modal-body uses 100dvh.

Playwright tests: 75/75 pass at 5 viewports (was 60/12-skip). New data-gating asserts: safe message present, MetricCard grid absent, Demo button hidden. New Analysis API contract test locks dataQuality.canShow.* schema. New BrainMap heading regression test. New Version traceability test (/api/v1/version must return real git SHA).

Dashboard KALKAN fake-AKTİF claim. StatBadge value 'AKTİF' + sub '4 risk filtresi çalışıyor' was misleading because KALKAN Risk Engine is FAZ 9 work, not yet built. Fixed: value → 'Hazırlanıyor', sub → 'Risk motoru FAZ 9'da devreye alınacak'. KALKAN Guard card inline badge AKTİF → 'Hazırlanıyor'. All 5 filter items (Sahte Kırılım/Geç Giriş/Risk-Ödül/FOMO/İntikam) flipped active:true → active:false. file: app/(app)/dashboard/page.tsx

MarketTicker conservative aggregate. Old rule 'verifiedLiveCount >= 3 ? live' meant 3/30 ratio claimed Canlı globally — misleading with mixed asset classes. New rule: tickerStatus = (allLive ? live : hasRecentTs ? delayed : no_data). With a mixed ticker (crypto/stocks/BIST/forex/commodities) the aggregate practically resolves to 'Gecikmeli', which is honest. file: components/ui/MarketTicker.tsx

Copilot mobile shell. Old height: calc(100dvh - 130px) arbitrary; ignored bottom nav + iOS safe-area. New: calc(100dvh - --app-ticker-height - --app-header-height - --app-bottom-nav-height - --app-safe-top - --app-safe-bottom - 16px). The composer input now sits above the bottom nav on real iOS where env(safe-area-inset-bottom) is non-zero. file: app/(app)/copilot/page.tsx

Playwright 85/85 pass at 5 viewports (was 75/0-skip). Two new tests: 'Dashboard fake-claim audit' (KALKAN-AKTİF pairing forbidden, '4 risk filtresi çalışıyor' forbidden) + 'Asset modal state reset' (no_data with mock body containing real-looking target:55000/RR:2.5 + canShow:false must NOT surface those numbers anywhere on the page). Locks the canShow-aware gating end-to-end.
CI: 4 node20→24 informational annotations. FORCE flag applied (b2a555b). Permanent fix: action maintainers update action.yml. GitHub enforces June 2 2026.

Vercel preview: 3 prior FAILED deploys (a878330, 3c085a4, 207962d). Two root causes fixed: auth.ts JWT_SECRET crash (dc73940) + rootDirectory:null via vercel.json (e8be547). Operator: trigger redeploy at 80e1e5a and confirm preview URL — vercel.json should make it pass without dashboard changes.

REAL_MOBILE_PASS: FAIL — real iOS screenshots from aycmarket.com confirmed production failures (asset detail metrics shown for fallback/insufficient data, hardcoded Canlı badge, KALKAN AKTİF fake claim). All known source-side leaks fixed (f96ff53, 4c876af, 80e1e5a). Re-test required on real device after Vercel preview at 80e1e5a succeeds. Manual steps: test-results/screenshots/phase3-real-mobile-smoke/MANUAL_STEPS.md.

PROD_PASS: FAIL — needs production deploy at 80e1e5a+ and confirmation that aycmarket.com/api/v1/version returns traceabilityComplete:true. With e8be547's build-time git embedding, only Vercel's auto-injected VERCEL_URL is needed (always present on Vercel deploys).
